evidencePacket.rollbackPlan: Restore original WIM artifact before any future offline-image mutation.
evidencePacket.beforeEvidence: Redacted offline image metadata and planned UX baseline packet.
evidencePacket.afterEvidencePlaceholder: Future after-state packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.independentVerificationPlaceholder: Future independent verification packet required before execution can be approved.
evidencePacket.failurePropagation: Any missing offline-image evidence keeps the decision blocked.
